name: anas-g-lens
description: Translate foreign code comments, docstrings, and text in real-time with Hover, CodeLens, and commands.

commands.title: Anas G Lens: Translate Selected Text
Anas G Lens: Translate All Comments in File
Anas G Lens: Toggle Hover Translation

anasGLens.targetLanguage.description: Target language code to translate into (e.g., 'en' for English, 'es' for Spanish, 'ur' for Urdu).

anasGLens.enableHoverTranslation.description: Enable translating comments and docstrings on hover.

anasGLens.enableCodeLens.description: Enable displaying a 'Translate' CodeLens above non-English comments.

anasGLens.translationService.description: The translation provider service to use.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
